{{Quote|Jaden, you've made it!|Jedi student upon seeing [[Jaden Korr]] during the [[Battle of Korriban (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|Battle of Korriban]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
The '''Jedi student''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] student at [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]] around the crisis of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]]. [[Rosh Penin]], a fellow student, complained to him that his [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]] [[Kyle Katarn]] did not foster his talent, but appeared to be holding him back by not sending him on any important missions. The Jedi student disagreed, arguing that their masters probably did not want to send the students on dangerous missions before they were sure they were ready for it.

The Jedi student was also present at the [[Battle of Korriban (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|Battle of Korriban]], having battled his way into the [[Tomb of Marka Ragnos]] with [[Jaden Korr]] and a few other [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]]. During the battle, he wielded an orange [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], with the [[Adjudicator (hilt)|Adjudicator hilt]] design.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Jedistudent.jpg|thumb|left|The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] student telling [[Rosh Penin]] not to worry about the way [[Kyle Katarn|Master Katarn]] handles his training.]]
[[File:JKA_jedi2.png|150.px||thumb|right|The Jedi student wields his lightsaber.]]
The student is voiced by [[Milton James]] (in Jedi Outcast) and [[Cam Clarke]] (Jedi Academy). The Jedi student is [[canon]]ical withing [[Star Wars Legends]], appearing in some cutscenes in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', in which he has some dialogue. Unlike most other Jedi characters in that game, the Jedi student is not randomly generated.

In the non-canonical [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] ending of the game Jaden Korr kills him. When Korr arrives on Korriban, the Jedi student immediately senses the presence of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|anger and hatred]] in Korr, thus proving a non-canonical knowledge of [[Force sense/Legends|Force sense]]. Depending on the chosen difficulty, the angered Korr either [[Telekinesis/Legends|hurls]] the Jedi student into a pillar and [[Death/Legends|kills]] him and another [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] before proceeding to the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley]], or he must defeat him, just as all the other Knights (which is necessary regardless of the difficulty), in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] to progress. During this non-canon duel, the Jedi student shows competence in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]], but he is beaten quite easily nonetheless.

The model used for the Jedi student also appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' as one of the possible models for basic Jedi student NPCs seen around the Academy during the levels set there. It is possible that it is the same student in an earlier stage of training.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
